## Contributing a Photo to Bioconductor 25 Years

Thank you for sharing your memory of the Bioconductor project!

### How It Works

- Photos are displayed in **alphabetical filename order**
- Use meaningful, sortable filenames to control placement, for example:
  - `YYYY-MM-DD-event-description.jpg` (chronological)
  - `2024-06-15-conference-keynote.png`
  - `2023-01-workshop-participants.jpg`

### Requirements

This PR will run automated checks to ensure:
- Image resolution ≤ 5000 × 5000 pixels
- File size ≤ 10 MB

### Checklist

- [ ] Photo file(s) are in `photos/` folder
- [ ] Filename is meaningful and describes the content
- [ ] I own or have permission to use this photo
- [ ] I accept that this photo will be publicly shared under the repository license

---

Please describe your photo(s) and any context you'd like to share about when or where they were taken.
